support.title: Ubufasha
support.description: Niba ufite ikibazo cyangwa ikibazo icyo ari cyo cyose ku butumire, urashobora kuvugana n'uwateje imbere:
support.rightsDescription: Urashobora gusaba gusibwa cyangwa kohereza amakuru yawe bwite igihe icyo ari cyo cyose hakurikijwe ububasha bwawe (GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPEDA cyangwa POPIA).
support.rightsHint: Umukiriya wawe wa imeyili azafunguka hamwe n'icyitegererezo cyateganyijwe. Urashobora no kwandikira adriancl2001@gmail.com.
support.ccpaText: Wedingo ntabwo igurisha amakuru bwite. Amakuru yakusanyirijwe akoreshwa gusa mu micungire y'ubutumire. Niba uri umuturage wa California, ufite uburenganzira bwo gusaba gusibwa amakuru yawe no kutavangura kubera gukoresha uburenganzira bwawe.
support.appDescription: Porogaramu y'urubuga rwo gucunga ubutumire bw'ubukwe.
support.copyright: © {{year}} Adrián Carrasco López. Uburenganzira bwose burubahirizwa.
support.deleteEmailBody:
Bite,

Nsaba gusibwa amakuru yanjye bwite ajyanye n'ubu butumire:

Izina ry'umushyitsi:
Token y'ubutumire (niba uyizi):

Gukoresha uburenganzira bwo gusiba (GDPR Ingingo ya 17 / CCPA / LGPD / POPIA).

Murakoze.
support.exportEmailBody:
Bite,

Nsaba kohereza amakuru yanjye bwite ajyanye n'ubu butumire:

Izina ry'umushyitsi:
Token y'ubutumire (niba uyizi):

Gukoresha uburenganzira bwo kwimura (GDPR Ingingo ya 20).

Murakoze.

cookie.title: Kwemera kuki
cookie.text: Wedingo ikoresha ububiko bw'ahantu bukenewe kugira ngo ubutumire bukore (kubika isesiyo yawe n'ibyifuzo). Ntago dukoresha kuki z'abandi cyangwa ibikurikirana.

legal.privacyPolicy:
Ushinzwe gutunganya amakuru: Adrián Carrasco López. Umuntu wavugana: adriancl2001@gmail.com. Intego: gucunga ubutumire bw'ubukwe, kwemeza ukuhaba no gutumanaho ku by'ibirori.

Ishingiro ry'amategeko: uburenganzira bw'umuntu urebwa (Ingingo 6.1.a GDPR). Amakuru y'ubuzima (allergie y'ibiribwa no kudashobora kwihanganira) atunganywa hamwe n'uburenganzira busesuye (Ingingo 9.2.a GDPR) kugira ngo meni y'ibirori ihuze n'ibikenewe.

Amakuru yakusanyirijwe: izina, ibyifuzo by'indyo (allergie no kudashobora kwihanganira), amashusho yashyizweho ku bushake, amakuru ya banki niba yatanzwe ku bushake.

Abakira: Google LLC (Firebase, Google Cloud Platform) ifite icyicaro muri Amerika. Google yiyandikishije ku Ngingo z'Amasezerano Asanzwe (SCC) zemejwe na Komisiyo y'Uburayi (Icyemezo cyo Gushyira mu Bikorwa 2021/914) kandi ifite Amasezerano yo Gutunganya Amakuru (DPA) hakurikijwe Ingingo 28 GDPR. Byongeye kandi, Google yubahiriza Uburyo bwo Kurinda Amakuru (DPF) EU-US, UK-US na Switzerland-US.

Kohereza amakuru mu mahanga: amakuru abikwa kuri seriveri za Google Cloud mu karere ka eur3 (Uburayi, Frankfurt). Iyo ari ngombwa kohereza amakuru muri Amerika, kohereza birinzwe na SCC hamwe n'icyemezo DPF cya Google.

Igihe cyo kubika: amakuru y'abashyitsi abikwa kugeza ku mezi 12 nyuma y'itariki y'ibirori. Icyo gihe kirenze, azasibwa mu buryo bwikora. Amakuru y'igenamiterere y'uwakoze abikwa mu gihe konti ikora.

Uburenganzira: urashobora gukoresha uburenganzira bwawe bwo kubona, gukosora, gusiba, kugabanya, kwimura no kurwanya wandikira adriancl2001@gmail.com. Abashyitsi barashobora gusaba gusibwa amakuru yabo bagaragaza izina ryabo n'ubutumire bwabo. Tuzasubiza icyifuzo cyawe mu minsi 30 ntarengwa.

Uburenganzira bwo gukura uburenganzira: urashobora gukura uburenganzira bwawe igihe icyo ari cyo cyose, ku ngaruka z'ejo hazaza, ukoresheje inzira zerekanwe haruguru. Gukuraho ntibigira ingaruka ku byemewe by'itunganywa ryabanjirije.

Uburenganzira bwo gutanga ikirego ku buyobozi bugenzura: munsi ya GDPR, ufite uburenganzira bwo gutanga ikirego ku buyobozi burengera amakuru mu bubasha bwawe. Muri Espanye: AEPD (www.aepd.es).
legal.termsText:
Gukoresha Wedingo bisobanura kwemera aya mategeko. Wedingo ni urubuga rwo gukora no gucunga ubutumire bw'ubukwe.

Ukoresha yiyemeje kutazakoresha urubuga mu ntego zitemewe n'amategeko cyangwa kohereza ibintu bibi.

Wedingo ntabwo ishinzwe ibintu byakozwe n'abakoresha cyangwa imikoreshereze y'abashyitsi y'amakuru yabo bwite.

Dufite uburenganzira bwo guhindura aya mategeko. Impinduka zizamenyeshwa binyuze ku rubuga.

Ku baturage ba California: iyo habaye amakimbirane hagati y'aya mategeko na CCPA, uburenganzira butangwa na CCPA buzatsinda.
legal.legalText:
Mu kubahiriza Ingingo ya 10 y'Itegeko 34/2002, ryo ku ya 11 Nyakanga, ku byerekeye Serivisi z'Umuryango w'Amakuru n'Ubucuruzi bwa Elektroniki (LSSI-CE), biramenyeshwa:

Ushinzwe: Adrián Carrasco López
Imeyili: adriancl2001@gmail.com
Intego y'urubuga: urubuga rw'ubutumire bw'ubukwe bwihariye.

Uru rubuga rukoresha Firebase (Google LLC) nk'ibikoresho remezo byo kwakira no kubika, hamwe na seriveri mu Muryango w'Uburayi.

compliance.title: Igitabo cy'ibikorwa byo gutunganya (Ingingo 30 GDPR)
compliance.updated: Byavuguruwe: Nyakanga 2026. Iki gitabo cyandika ibikorwa byo gutunganya amakuru bwite muri Wedingo.
compliance.row1Data: Amazina y'abakwe, itariki, ahantu, insanganyamatsiko, amafoto, umuziki, meni, ibice
compliance.row2Data: Izina ry'umushyitsi, ukuhaba (yego/oya), guhitamo meni, allergie, amakuru y'ubuzima
compliance.row3Data: Amafoto y'ubukwe (yabitswe mu ibanga na AES-256-GCM)
compliance.row4Data: Token ya sesiyo, izina ry'ukoresha admin
compliance.row5Data: Ibikorwa bya superadmin, token zakoreshejwe, ubutumire bwasibwe
compliance.internationalText: Amakuru abikwa kuri seriveri za Google Cloud mu karere ka eur3 (Frankfurt, Ubudage). Google LLC (Amerika) ikora nk'utunganya amakuru munsi ya DPA hakurikijwe Ingingo 28 GDPR. Kohereza muri Amerika birinzwe na:
compliance.scc: Ingingo z'Amasezerano Asanzwe (SCC) - Icyemezo cyo Gushyira mu Bikorwa 2021/914
compliance.dpf: Uburyo bwo Kurinda Amakuru (DPF) EU-US, UK-US na Switzerland-US
compliance.measureTls: Umurongo w'ikoranabuhanga HTTPS (TLS 1.3) ku rubuga rwose
compliance.measureFirestore: Amategeko y'umutekano ya Firestore (kugenzura kwinjira bishingiye kuri sesiyo)
compliance.measureStorage: Ububiko bw'ahantu buke kandi hamwe n'uburenganzira gusa
compliance.measureRetention: Politiki yo kubika: amezi 12 nyuma y'ibirori ku makuru y'abashyitsi
compliance.measureSuperadmin: Superadmin irinzwe na Firebase Authentication + inzira yihishe

invitationText: Dutegereje kuzishimira uyu mwanya udasanzwe hamwe nawe.
We look forward to celebrating this special moment with you.

golden: Nibyiza kandi byiza, hamwe na zahabu.
Elegant and bright, with golden accents.
forest: Kamere kandi ituje hamwe nicyatsi kibisi.
Natural and sober with soft greens.
rose: Igishyushye kandi cyoroshye, gifite ibara ryijimye.
Warm and delicate, with pink hues.
linen-soft: Umucyo kandi utabogamye, hamwe numutuzo kandi uhoraho.
Light and neutral, with a serene and timeless presence.
blush-pearl: Byoroheje kandi byurukundo, hamwe na pearl tone.
Soft and romantic, with pearly pink tones.
lavender-mist: Gishya kandi ituje, hamwe na lavender na mauve hues.
Fresh and serene, with lavender and mauve hues.
champagne-bubble: Umucyo no kwizihiza, hamwe na zahabu nziza.
Bright and festive, with warm golden sparkles.
amber-night: Umwijima kandi mwiza, hamwe na amber na zahabu.
Dark and elegant, with amber and gold highlights.
onyx-gold: Byimbitse kandi bihanitse, hamwe na zahabu nyinshi inyuma yijimye.
Deep and sophisticated, with intense gold on dark background.
midnight-royal: Ubururu bwijimye cyane hamwe na zahabu nini kandi ihari.
Very dark blue with intense gold and solemn presence.
burgundy-velvet: Gishyushye no guhisha, hamwe na vino itukura hamwe na zahabu.
Warm and enveloping, with red wine and golden sparkles.
sapphire-night: Ubururu bwimbitse hamwe na feza hamwe no gutuza.
Deep blue with silver accents and serene presence.
emerald-grove: Icyatsi kibisi cyimbitse gifite zahabu kandi nziza.
Deep natural green with golden and elegant hues.
plum-twilight: Umutuku wijimye ufite ibara ryijimye kandi ryurukundo.
Intense purple with pink and romantic sparkles.
rainbow: Celebration of diverse love with rainbow colors.
trans: Ubururu, umutuku n'umweru mugushimira ibendera rya trans.
Blue, pink and white in tribute to the trans flag.
nonbinary: Umuhondo, umweru, umutuku n'umukara kubendera ritari binini.
Yellow, white, purple and black for the non-binary flag.
lesbian: Icunga, cyera n'iroza ry'ibendera rya lesbiyani.
Orange, white and pink of the lesbian flag.
bi: Umutuku, umutuku n'ubururu bya bi bendera.
Pink, purple and blue of the bi flag.
pan: Pink, yellow and blue of the pan flag.
ace: Umukara, imvi, umweru nubururu bwibendera ridasanzwe.
Black, gray, white and purple of the asexual flag.

playArea: Murakaza neza hamwe n'ahantu ho gukinira
